groups.storefront.title: Communities
groups.storefront.body: Discover public groups and join communities around shared interests.
groups.storefront.empty: No public groups are available yet.
groups.storefront.application.title: Apply to join this group
groups.storefront.application.body: Answer the current membership questions and acknowledge required rules. Your submission keeps an immutable snapshot for review.
groups.storefront.application.unavailabl: Membership applications are unavailable for this group or locale.
groups.storefront.application.error: Membership application could not be submitted
groups.storefront.application.invalidGro: The application link contains an invalid group UUID.
groups.storefront.application.unknownQue: The application contains an unknown question.
groups.storefront.application.answerTooL: One or more answers exceed their character limit.
groups.storefront.application.unknownRul: The application contains an unknown rule acknowledgement.
groups.storefront.invitation.title: Accept a group invitation
groups.storefront.invitation.body: Sign in, review the invitation token, and join the group. The token is removed from the URL when the command is submitted.
groups.storefront.invitation.targetedBod: This invitation was addressed to your account. Sign in and accept it without exposing an invitation token.
groups.storefront.invitation.tokenHint: Paste the opaque token from the invitation. It is never displayed after acceptance.
groups.storefront.invitation.targetedHin: The invitation identifier came from an authorized notification route and can only be accepted by the addressed account.
groups.storefront.invitation.success: Invitation accepted. You are now a group member.
groups.storefront.invitation.invalidToke: The invitation token has an invalid length.
groups.storefront.invitation.invalidInvi: The targeted invitation identifier is invalid.
